title: Mahendrapalli Tirumeni Azhagar Temple
tagline: Mahendrapalli Tirumeni Azhagar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Mahendrapalli Tirumeni Azhagar Temple, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Mahendrapalli Tirumeni Azhagar Temple (மகேந்திரப்பள்ளி திருமேனியழகர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Mahendirapalli in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Mahendrapalli Tirumeni Azhagar Temple (மகேந்திரப்பள்ளி திருமேனியழகர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Mahendirapalli in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva. He is called as Tirumeni Azhagar. His consort is known as Vadivambigai.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kodiyampalayam
topPlaces.description: Kodiyampalayam (Tamil: [koɖijampaːʎajam], ISO: Koṭiyam-pāḷaiyam), is a continental island surrounded by Mangrove forests, located in Mayiladuthurai district, in Tamil Nadu, India. The island situated at the mouth of Kollidam river, a northern distributary of the Cauvery River.

topPlaces.name: Kollidam River
topPlaces.description: The Kollidam (referred to as Coleroon in Colonial English) is a river in southeastern India. The Kollidam is the northern distributary of the Cauvery River as it flows through the delta districts.

topPlaces.name: Achalpuram Shivalokathyagar Temple
topPlaces.description: Achalpuram Shivalokathyagar Temple (ஆச்சாள்புரம் சிவலோகத்தியாகர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located in Achalpuram village, in the Kollidam block of Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Pichavaram
topPlaces.description: Pichavaram is one of the villages of Parangipettai in Cuddalore District, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located between the Vellar estuary in the north and Coleroon estuary in the south.

topPlaces.name: Tiruvetkalam Pasupatheswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Tiruvetkalam Pasupatheswarar Temple is a Hindu temple of the god Shiva located at Chidambaram in Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshipped as Pasupatheswarar, along with His consort known as Satgunambal and Nalla Nayaki.

topPlaces.name: Tirukkazhippalai Palvannanathar Temple
topPlaces.description: Tirukkazhippalai Palvannanathar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Sivapuri in Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva in the form of Palvannanathar and his consort is known as Vedanayaki.

topPlaces.name: Kollidam, Mayiladuthurai
topPlaces.description: Kollidam (also spelled Koḷḷiṭam in Tamil), formerly known as Coleroon is a panchayat town and headquarters of the Kollidam revenue block in the Mayiladuthurai district, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The name derived from the settlement named after the Kollidam River, the northern distributary of the river Cauvery.

topPlaces.name: Sivapuri Uchinathar Temple
topPlaces.description: Sivapuri Uchinathar Temple (also called Thirunelvayil) is a Hindu temple located at Sivapuri in Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India. The place is also known as Thirunelvayil.

items.note: Kodiyampalayam (Tamil: [koɖijampaːʎajam], ISO: Koṭiyam-pāḷaiyam), is a continental island surrounded by Mangrove forests, located in Mayiladuthurai district, in Tamil Nadu, India. The island situated at the mouth of Kollidam river, a northern distributary of the Cauvery River.
The Kollidam (referred to as Coleroon in Colonial English) is a river in southeastern India. The Kollidam is the northern distributary of the Cauvery River as it flows through the delta districts.

Pichavaram is one of the villages of Parangipettai in Cuddalore District, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located between the Vellar estuary in the north and Coleroon estuary in the south.

Tiruvetkalam Pasupatheswarar Temple is a Hindu temple of the god Shiva located at Chidambaram in Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshipped as Pasupatheswarar, along with His consort known as Satgunambal and Nalla Nayaki.

Tirukkazhippalai Palvannanathar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Sivapuri in Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva in the form of Palvannanathar and his consort is known as Vedanayaki.

Kollidam (also spelled Koḷḷiṭam in Tamil), formerly known as Coleroon is a panchayat town and headquarters of the Kollidam revenue block in the Mayiladuthurai district, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The name derived from the settlement named after the Kollidam River, the northern distributary of the river Cauvery.
Sivapuri Uchinathar Temple (also called Thirunelvayil) is a Hindu temple located at Sivapuri in Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India. The place is also known as Thirunelvayil.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mahendrapalli Tirumeni Azhagar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mahendrapalli Tirumeni Azhagar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mahendrapalli Tirumeni Azhagar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (136 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (136 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mahendrapalli Tirumeni Azhagar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mahendrapalli Tirumeni Azhagar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mahendrapalli Tirumeni Azhagar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Mahendrapalli Tirumeni Azhagar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mahendrapalli Tirumeni Azhagar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kodiyampalayam, Kollidam River, Achalpuram Shivalokathyagar Temple, Pichavaram, Tiruvetkalam Pasupatheswarar Temple.
